description: Personalised Baby Romper Suit with Any Text or Image, Baby Personalised Text and Image Romper Suit, Gift Personalised Gift For Baby, Personalised Gifts for Baby Boy or Girl Personalise this Baby Romper Suit with any writing or image. Perfect for your son or daughter as a keepsake, or announce your prgnancy to your friends and family Need a cute gift for your friends baby boy or girl? Rompers are great for gifting for Birthdays, Christmas, Valentines Day or as a cute surprise, This Personalised Baby Romper Suit with Any Text or Image would make a great gift idea for Baby Our baby romper suits are available in sizes 0-3m - 6-12m, 0-3 Months ( Length 55cm, Chest 22cm, Arm 19cm ), 3-6 Months ( Length 59cm, Chest 25cm, Arm 20cm ), 6-12 Months ( Length 61cm, Chest 28cm, Arm 23cm ). Treat your baby to something special, it makes a great birthday present as well as a unique memorable newborn gift, this Baby Personalised Baby Romper Suit with Any Text or Image Romper Suits or Bodysuits - they?re a classic baby clothing staple, and for good reason: They?re easy to get on and off, comfy for babies young and old and can be styled in a variety of ways. This romper suit would make a brilliant gift for a newborn for a baby shower. This super cute design is professionally printed on to a soft cotton romper suit available in a range of colours and sizes. Please check out our size guide to help you choose the best size for your long sleeved babygrow, if you need any help with this then we are happy to help. Romper suit features Brand new unworn romper suit with tags attached delivered in a mailing poly bag Please see size guides for specific measurements Professionally printed design in the UK 100% Cotton Rompersuit 200gsm (approx) Long Sleeve Nickel Free Poppers
